name: multi-company-portal
description: Multi-company login portal that hosts the FinTrack financial app per tenant, with master/staff accounts.
whatsNew: New "Buy/Sell AUD" entry type (More drawer) for third-party buy/sell: enter an amount and a Rate, and it auto-writes the sum to the note (e.g. 5x3=15). It feeds a new "Buy/Sell AUD" stat card. No bank is selected by default.
New "Buy AUD" tick-box on Regular Withdrawal: the full amount still counts as a withdrawal, the Buy AUD part is taken from the Buy/Sell AUD balance, and any leftover becomes unclaimed credit.
